title: Key Stage 4 (KS4) final performance tables — school-level data, 2017/18
notes: Outcome-year vintage. Outcome = P8MEA (2017/18) linked by URN to the 2015/16 decision file. Linkage caveat: schools that became SPONSORED academies after being flagged below floor are re-issued a NEW URN, so they may be absent under their original URN; this treatment-correlated attrition is measured and reported in the mark's validity dossier. Not vendored into git: fetch from download_uri (or the R2 mirror) into data/cache and verify against sha256.
